overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rainy, neon-lit Night City intersection and along commercial sidewalks. The scene features wet streets with reflective surfaces, holographic billboards, towering cyberpunk skyscrapers, and steady pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy neon-lit intersection with holographic billboards

events.description: character begins walking forward from standing position at crosswalk
vehicles pass by on the right side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: standing at crosswalk then beginning to cross the wet street alongside a companion

notable_agents.action: companion character walking alongside ego across the street before disappearing

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying animated advertisement with red background
wide pedestrian crossing with bold diagonal black and yellow stripes
towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon accents
tall modern street lamp casting bright light on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character standing at a rainy neon-lit intersection in Night City. A large red holographic billboard dominates the left side while the character begins crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with a companion. Vehicles move along the wet streets as the camera follows the character forward through the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with security service building

events.description: character reaches far side of intersection and steps onto sidewalk
character turns right to follow the sidewalk along the street

agents.ego_description: reaching the far side of the intersection and turning right onto the covered sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrians with umbrellas walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: teal-colored commercial building with glowing neon signage reading SECURITY SERVICE
illuminated pedestrian walk signal mounted on metal pole

segments.scene_description: The character completes crossing the street and transitions onto a concrete sidewalk, turning right past a teal-colored Security Service building with bright neon signage. The environment becomes more enclosed as pedestrians with umbrellas walk in the opposite direction, and the camera moves under building overhangs that provide shelter from the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with tech shops

events.description: entering covered arcade area with intensified neon lighting and reflections

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past storefronts and other pedestrians under covered walkways

entered.detail: storefront with large orange neon signage reading PREFAB CITY and green interior lighting
metal and glass awning structure covering the pedestrian walkway
glowing purple and pink commercial signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered commercial sidewalk beneath metal and glass awnings, passing the Prefab City store with its distinctive orange neon signage. The area is densely packed with neon purple and pink signage, vending machines, and other pedestrians, while remaining sheltered from the rain under the overhead cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban street with moving traffic

events.description: exiting covered walkway to open sidewalk with illuminated cherry trees
multiple vehicles pass by on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past illuminated cherry blossom trees with moderate foot traffic

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with umbrella walking toward camera along the tree-lined path

entered.detail: decorative trees with pink and white LED blossoms lining the sidewalk
multi-level elevated roadway structure with moving traffic

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered walkway onto an open sidewalk lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees glowing with pink and white LEDs. The elevated highway structure runs parallel on the right with steady traffic, while pedestrians with umbrellas share the wet concrete path. The scene maintains the neon-drenched cyberpunk atmosphere with towering buildings visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, rain-slicked city intersection into the densely packed, neon-lit corridors of a commercial district. It begins with the character crossing a yellow-striped street beneath a massive red holographic billboard, moving through the open intersection as vehicles glide across the wet pavement. As the character reaches the other side, the scene shifts from the open road to a more enclosed concrete sidewalk, passing a teal Security Service building and moving under protective overhangs to escape the rain. The camera then follows the character deeper into a sheltered commercial zone, gliding past the orange neon of a Prefab City store amidst a blur of purple and pink signage and vending machines. Finally, the path opens up again as the character exits the covered walkway onto a sidewalk lined with glowing LED cherry blossom trees, running parallel to an elevated highway under the shadow of towering skyscrapers.
